summary: Compared P0-01 Full-Memory Audit and P0-02 Status Freshness plan requirements against the current DinoBrain repo and live data-root status artifacts. Found both have working CLI/build/status/test surfaces, but both remain partial against the full plan: P0-01 lacks encoding/line/char fields, full parse/encoding deltas, MCP/service/app exposure, and clean Korean visible proof; P0-02 lacks plan-specific health_status/client_mcp_direct_status freshness matrix, authority_rank/last_computed_at fields, direct MCP proof precedence, and UI freshness band proof.
decisions: Treated the task as read-only; no repo files edited.
Used the injected DinoBrain preflight and live data-root status files as evidence.
Ran the two focused smoke verifiers with bundled Node from AppData because node is not on PATH.
next_steps: Implement missing plan-level metadata and exposure gaps before claiming P0-01/P0-02 complete.
Add direct MCP/health freshness artifacts or explicitly remap the plan matrix to the current .dino/state model.
Fix Korean visible_status encoding before using UI proof as acceptance evidence.
search_queries: P0-01 P0-02 Full-Memory Status Freshness plan requirements
DinoBrain full-memory audit status freshness current implementation
